================================================================================
modern_app_header
================================================================================
app [main!] { pf: platform "./platform/main.roc" }

import pf.Stdout

main! = || Stdout.line!("Hello")
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (app_header
    (provides_list
      (identifier))
    (packages_list
      (platform_ref
        (identifier)
        (package_uri))))
  (import_expr
    (import_ident
      (identifier)
      (module)))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        body: (expr_body
          (function_call_pnc_expr
            caller: (variable_expr
              (module)
              (identifier))
            args: (const
              (string))))))))

================================================================================
modern_match_expression
================================================================================
color_name = |color| match color {
    Red => "red"
    Green => "green"
    Blue => "blue"
}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (match_expr
            (match)
            (variable_expr
              (identifier))
            branch: (match_branch
              pattern: (tag_pattern
                (tag
                  (identifier)))
              (fat_arrow)
              expr: (expr_body
                (const
                  (string))))
            branch: (match_branch
              pattern: (tag_pattern
                (tag
                  (identifier)))
              (fat_arrow)
              expr: (expr_body
                (const
                  (string))))
            branch: (match_branch
              pattern: (tag_pattern
                (tag
                  (identifier)))
              (fat_arrow)
              expr: (expr_body
                (const
                  (string))))))))))

================================================================================
modern_lambda_syntax
================================================================================
add = |a, b| a + b
identity = |x| x
thunk = || 42
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier))
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (bin_op_expr
            part: (variable_expr
              (identifier))
            part: (operator)
            part: (variable_expr
              (identifier)))))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (variable_expr
            (identifier))))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        body: (expr_body
          (const
            (int)))))))

================================================================================
modern_opaque_type
================================================================================
Color := [Red, Green, Blue].{
    to_str : Color -> Str
    to_str = |c| "color"
}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (nominal_type_def
    (apply_type
      (concrete_type))
    (colon_equals)
    (tags_type
      (tag_type)
      (tag_type)
      (tag_type))
    (nominal_methods
      (value_declaration
        (annotation_type_def
          (annotation_pre_colon
            (identifier))
          (function_type
            param: (apply_type
              (concrete_type))
            (arrow)
            (apply_type
              (concrete_type))))
        (decl_left
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (anon_fun_expr
            args: (argument_patterns
              (identifier_pattern
                (identifier)))
            body: (expr_body
              (const
                (string)))))))))

================================================================================
modern_type_alias
================================================================================
Username :: Str
Point :: { x: I64, y: I64 }
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (opaque_type_def
    (apply_type
      (concrete_type))
    (double_colon)
    (apply_type
      (concrete_type)))
  (opaque_type_def
    (apply_type
      (concrete_type))
    (double_colon)
    (record_type
      (record_field_type
        (field_name)
        (apply_type
          (concrete_type)))
      (record_field_type
        (field_name)
        (apply_type
          (concrete_type))))))

================================================================================
modern_effectful_types
================================================================================
print! : Str => {}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (annotation_type_def
    (annotation_pre_colon
      (identifier))
    (function_type
      param: (apply_type
        (concrete_type))
      (fat_arrow)
      (record_type))))

================================================================================
modern_paren_generics
================================================================================
numbers : List(I64)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (annotation_type_def
    (annotation_pre_colon
      (identifier))
    (apply_type
      (concrete_type)
      type_args: (apply_type_arg
        (apply_type
          (concrete_type))))))

================================================================================
modern_block_body
================================================================================
compute = |x| {
    doubled = x * 2
    tripled = x * 3
    doubled + tripled
}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (body_expression
            (value_declaration
              (decl_left
                (identifier_pattern
                  (identifier)))
              body: (expr_body
                (bin_op_expr
                  part: (variable_expr
                    (identifier))
                  part: (operator)
                  part: (const
                    (int)))))
            (value_declaration
              (decl_left
                (identifier_pattern
                  (identifier)))
              body: (expr_body
                (bin_op_expr
                  part: (variable_expr
                    (identifier))
                  part: (operator)
                  part: (const
                    (int)))))
            (bin_op_expr
              part: (variable_expr
                (identifier))
              part: (operator)
              part: (variable_expr
                (identifier)))))))))

================================================================================
modern_match_with_payload
================================================================================
unwrap = |opt| match opt {
    Some(x) => x
    None => 0
}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (match_expr
            (match)
            (variable_expr
              (identifier))
            branch: (match_branch
              pattern: (tag_pattern
                (tag
                  (identifier))
                args: (identifier_pattern
                  (identifier)))
              (fat_arrow)
              expr: (expr_body
                (variable_expr
                  (identifier))))
            branch: (match_branch
              pattern: (tag_pattern
                (tag
                  (identifier)))
              (fat_arrow)
              expr: (expr_body
                (const
                  (int))))))))))

================================================================================
modern_record_update
================================================================================
update_name = |person| { ..person, name: "New" }
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (record_expr
            (spread_expr
              (variable_expr
                (identifier)))
            (record_field_expr
              (field_name)
              (expr_body
                (const
                  (string))))))))))

================================================================================
modern_expect
================================================================================
expect 1 + 1 == 2
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (expect
    body: (expr_body
      (bin_op_expr
        part: (const
          (int))
        part: (operator)
        part: (const
          (int))
        part: (operator)
        part: (const
          (int))))))
